title: Wire CLI/env to OpenAI-compatible LLM client
description: Create configuration/env wiring so infer/run can construct the OpenAI-compatible LLM client when credentials are present, while preserving graceful fallback when absent.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN LLM env config is present THEN infer/run pass a real OpenAiCompatibleLlmClient into inference; WHEN env config is absent THEN output records limited LLM fallback without throwing.
review_initial_requirements: Verify env/config parsing does not leak secrets and injects the client into inference.
review_regression_requirements: Verify tests cover configured and unconfigured LLM paths without using real credentials.

title: Implement real interactive candidate review prompt
description: Replace confirm-all interactive behavior with per-candidate CLI decisions for confirm, reject, clarify, skip, and all-confirm flows.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN --interactive is used in a TTY THEN candidate requirements are prompted one by one; WHEN non-TTY THEN candidates are not silently confirmed.
review_initial_requirements: Verify candidate status transitions map to explicit review decisions only.
review_regression_requirements: Verify interactive and non-interactive regression tests pass.

title: Emit coverage completeness warnings for missing mappings
description: Make report verification warnings reflect missing required coverage mappings such as Action without R1, Parameter without R3, Risk without R7, and Handling without R8.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN coverage rows contain missing required mappings THEN report.md lists concrete warnings; WHEN all required mappings are covered THEN warnings can be None.
review_initial_requirements: Verify coverage warning rules align with docs/需求挖掘.md coverage checks.
review_regression_requirements: Verify report generation tests cover missing and complete coverage cases.
